# Microgrid Projects

> A global research directory of 197 geocoded microgrid projects, with sourced organizations, reported system specifications, equipment, operating context, and citations.

Microgrid Projects is maintained by MicrogridModeler, Inc. Historical records require independent verification. Project pages distinguish sourced claims from unknown or undisclosed details.

## Core resources

- [Project directory](https://microgridprojects.com/projects): Browse and filter all 197 project records.
- [Microgrid markets](https://microgridprojects.com/markets): Regional and deployment context.
- [Types of microgrids](https://microgridprojects.com/guides/types-of-microgrids): Definitions and a side-by-side comparison.
- [Research methodology](https://microgridprojects.com/about#methodology): How the archive was recovered, enriched, and cited.
- [XML sitemap](https://microgridprojects.com/sitemap.xml): Complete canonical URL inventory.
- [Submit or correct a record](https://microgridprojects.com/contact#submit): Contact the research team.

## Citation guidance

Use the canonical URL shown on each project page. Follow the numbered source links for claim-level provenance, and independently verify historical facts before using them for engineering, procurement, investment, or policy decisions.
